title: Malaysia among most resilient emerging markets amid global shocks, says Moody’s
description: KUALA LUMPUR: Malaysia is among the most resilient emerging markets in navigating recent global financial shocks, supported by policy strength and relatively stable market conditions, according to Moody's Ratings.

title: GOP governor candidates share viewpoints
description: Editor’s note: Greggory Hull, Duke Rodriguez and Doug Turner are seeking the governor’s seat in the June 2 Republican primary. The winning candidate will face a Democrat in November. Incumbent Michelle Lujan Grisham is term limited and unable to run for this four-year term. Early voting is under way. The candidates answered questions via email. Their answers were not edited. title: From Bussy Anand to actor Srinath: The likely faces in Vijay’s Cabinet – Full list inside
description: Vijay TVK| A monumental political transformation—unprecedented in the history of Tamil Nadu politics—has taken place. Shattering the bipolar political landscape that had prevailed for several decades, the TVK has ascended to the throne of Tamil Nadu, securing victory in 108 constituencies.

Some users report Share and Save buttons are completely unresponsive on the YouTube mobile app
description: Many YouTube app users are facing a frustrating glitch where the Share and Save buttons reportedly become unresponsive. The problem started appearing for several users in May 2026, according to some posts on Reddit. The issue affects both iOS and Android. People tap the Share or Save buttons below videos, but... nothing happens. Saving videos [...] The post Some users report Share and Save buttons are completely unresponsive on the YouTube mobile app appeared first on PiunikaWeb .
